scripts.clean:vite: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$cache = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'wecom-oa-vite-cache'; if (Test-Path $cache) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $cache -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path '.vite') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.vite' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run kill:vite && npm run clean:vite && vite --force
